supply.notes: Original 1B ALPH hard cap was removed by the Danube upgrade activated 2025-07-15; ALPH now has unlimited Monero-style tail emission. Current_supply pulled from the official Alephium mainnet backend (total-alph endpoint) on 2026-05-28. Circulating-only figure from the explorer's circulating endpoint is 133,187,781.90 ALPH (excludes locked premine addresses).

emission.current_block_reward_note: Network-aggregate per 8-second slot across all 16 sharded chains. Per-shard per-block reward is approximately 0.259 ALPH (4.1411 ÷ 16). Under PoLW the effective per-shard reward = min(time-based ceiling 1.25 ALPH/block post-Danube, hashrate-based curve); the hashrate-based curve currently dominates, so the actual per-block reward is well below the time-based ceiling. The 4.1411 figure is back-calculated from the empirical daily emission (44,724 ALPH/day ÷ 10,800 8-second slots) and is the value that satisfies the renderer's daily-emission formula for a sharded chain.
emission.daily_emission_basis: empirical: supply delta (221,615,739 ALPH on 2026-05-28) minus 212,000,000 ALPH on 2025-10-25 = 9,615,739 ALPH over 215 days = 44,724 ALPH/day average. annual_inflation_pct = 44724 × 365 / 221615739 × 100 = 7.37%.

halving_schedule.reward_before: 2.5 ALPH per 16s period (time-based, aggregate across 16 chains)
halving_schedule.reward_after: 1.25 ALPH per 8s period (time-based, aggregate across 16 chains); 1B max-supply cap removed; unlimited tail emission introduced

halving_schedule.reward_before: Time-based component decaying from launch value of 7.5 ALPH per period toward 2.5 ALPH (per 16s) / 1.25 ALPH (per 8s post-Danube)
halving_schedule.reward_after: Time-based component fixed at 2.5 ALPH per 16s period (1.25 ALPH per 8s post-Danube), held constant thereafter

emission.notes: Alephium uses Proof-of-Less-Work (PoLW): effective per-block reward = min(time-based curve, hashrate-based curve), so a single 'current_block_reward' value is misleading. Network runs 16 sharded chains; block_time_seconds=8 is the per-shard target after Danube. Observed empirical daily emission (supply delta of ~9.6M ALPH between 2025-10-25 and 2026-05-28) is approximately 44,000-45,000 ALPH/day, materially above the time-based ceiling because measurement covers a period of changing hashrate and the PoLW hashrate curve. daily_emission and annual_inflation_pct left null because the standard (86400/block_time)*block_reward formula assumes a single chain and a single static reward — neither holds here.

premine.details: 140M ALPH minted at genesis (14% of the original 1B cap), distributed across Sales (62.95M sold + 17.05M reserved unsold) and entity-controlled funds (30M Treasury & Team + 30M Community & Ecosystem). All scheduled buckets vest on-chain quarterly with no separate cliffs. The 860M mining allocation remained intact through the July 2025 Danube upgrade; the upgrade removed the hard cap on miner emissions but did not change the genesis premine.

market_data.notes: Price and 24h volume from CoinGecko on 2026-05-28; CoinMarketCap corroborates at $0.037582 / $169,722 volume. Thinly traded; primary venue MEXC (ALPH/USDT ~$71,677 daily). fdmc not computable (max_supply removed by Danube upgrade).

notes: Mainnet launched 2021-11-08 with a 14% genesis premine (140M of original 1B cap); 860M was allocated to mining over ~80 years.

Genesis premine sub-buckets (per official Alephium tokenomics post): 80M Sales total (62,951,077 sold across seed + pre-sale + private-sale rounds, vesting 2-4 years quarterly with no cliff; 17,048,943 reserved for future strategic sales / OTC), 30M Treasury & Team (3-year quarterly vest, no cliff), 30M Community & Ecosystem Development (4-year quarterly vest, no cliff).

Sep 2021 pre-sale tranche raised $3.6M from ~80 contributors; only 3 lead investors named at the time (Alphemy Capital, White Paper Capital, Archery Blockchain); later disclosures added Cetacean Capital, Luminescence Capital, International Blockchain Consulting. 76% of contributors put in <$50K and 91% put in <$100K.

July 15 2025 Danube upgrade removed the 1B ALPH hard cap and introduced unlimited tail emissions (Monero-style), and halved the per-shard block time from 16s to 8s with proportional emission adjustment. ALPH is now an uncapped-supply asset; fdmc / pct_mined are not defined.

Proof-of-Less-Work (PoLW): effective block reward = min(time-based curve, hashrate-based curve). After Year-4 stabilization (Nov 2025), the time-based ceiling is fixed at 2.5 ALPH per 16s period (1.25 ALPH per 8s post-Danube) across the 16 chains. The hashrate-based curve adjusts dynamically and currently dominates pricing of the per-block reward.
Deflationary mechanics: 100% of transaction fees burned since the Leman upgrade (Mar 2023); PoLW burning activates when network hashrate exceeds 1 EH/s.
No dev tax; no treasury cut from block rewards. All entity allocations were funded entirely from the genesis premine and vest on-chain.
Pure PoW: 16 sharded chains, no staking, validators, or delegation.
